'''Derr''' was a [[Temperature/Legends|frigid]] [[Water/Legends|ice]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Demophon system/Legends|Demophon system]] with a single [[Moon/Legends|moon]].<ref name="S" /> It was [[Demophon supernova|destroyed]] when its [[Demophon (star)|star]] went [[Supernova/Legends|supernova]].<ref name="BE">{{WEGCite|story=The Beginning of the End|book=Supernova (sourcebook)}}</ref>

{{Planet-stub}}
